jsonLd.title: Snapdeal is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Snapdeal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Snapdeal:
Snapdeal is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
